items.title: Peru election drags into second day after ballot delivery fiasco
items.dek: Technical and logistical problems mean Peruvians choosing a new president and members of Congress continue to vote on Monday.
items.body: Technical and logistical problems mean Peruvians choosing a new president and members of Congress continue to vote on Monday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Iran carried out highest number of executions in decades
items.dek: Organisations warn many more people could be executed in the wake of the anti-government protests which swept Iran earlier this year.
items.body: Organisations warn many more people could be executed in the wake of the anti-government protests which swept Iran earlier this year.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Top 10 WrestleMania moments: From double turns to the end of the streak
items.dek: ESPN combed through more than 450 matches to rank the 10 greatest moments in WrestleMania history.
items.body: ESPN combed through more than 450 matches to rank the 10 greatest moments in WrestleMania history.
